title: P1 UX：七天日卡精簡為單排選擇列並上移，與行前建議/日出日落同視窗
environment: Executor: ubuntu-dev mainline worktree at /home/esgcenter0/python/Academic/trip-weather-planner using ~/venvs/python-env

context.background: Final layout convergence from user review. The 7-day cards became the date selector in the previous card, but they sit below 行前建議/日出日落, so clicking a day and seeing the result requires scrolling up and down. Decision (user + management agreed): compact the 7 day cards into a single-row day strip and move it ABOVE the advice/sunrise section so the selector and the content it controls share one viewport.
context.design: Each strip cell keeps only selection-relevant info: date M/D + weekday, weather icon, high/low temp, PoP percent. The per-card advice_hint text is dropped — it duplicates 行前建議 which now updates in place on click. This mirrors standard weather-app day-strip conventions (CWA site, Apple Weather).

in_scope: D1 restructure result layout order to: query form -> 7-day strip -> 行前建議 + 日出日落 (+UV) -> 72h chart

D2 compact day cells: single row of 7 slim cards showing 日期(M/D)+星期, weather icon, 高/低溫, 降雨%; remove the per-cell advice hint text; selected cell clearly highlighted; hover/cursor affordance and keyboard accessibility preserved from the previous card
D3 responsive behavior: the strip stays one row; on narrow viewports it scrolls horizontally inside its own container (no wrapping to multiple rows, no page-level horizontal scroll)
D4 interaction unchanged: clicking a strip cell switches highlight + 行前建議 + 日出日落 via the existing cached re-query mechanism, no page reload, no scroll jump
D5 tests: update/extend frontend tests for the new layout order, strip rendering (7 cells, correct fields, no advice hint), and click-switch behavior
out_of_scope: 72h chart changes (position moves with layout only)

requirements: R1: No regression of prior cards: region-only form, day-click switching, purged technical strings (示範資料 badge rule), sunrise date labeling, enlarged 72h place label, local-date correctness, stable week + chart
R2: Mock mode end-to-end intact; deterministic tests unaffected
R3: English-only code comments; no secrets in tracked files
acceptance_criteria: AC1: ruff + pytest + frontend tests + npm run build all pass
AC2: Layout order is form -> day strip -> 行前建議/日出日落 -> 72h chart
AC3: The 7 day cells render in one row with date+weekday, icon, high/low, PoP% and no advice-hint text; selected cell visibly highlighted
AC4: Clicking any cell updates 行前建議 and 日出日落 in place with no page scroll jump; strip and advice are simultaneously visible in a typical laptop viewport
AC5: On a narrow viewport the strip scrolls horizontally within its container without wrapping or page-level horizontal scroll
AC6: Changes committed per-AC and pushed to origin
operational_notes: Live-mode town codes are CWA-sourced (e.g. cwa-65000260); read from live /api/towns before manual testing.
Ports 18082/5173 are free at dispatch time; use them or any free ports for live verification and clean up afterward.
Frontend-only card; do not touch backend files.

report_template.location: Ubuntu agent-bridge reports path or repo-local equivalent used by the current workflow

user_one_liner: Compact the 7-day cards into a single-row day strip (date+weekday, icon, high/low, PoP; no advice hint) and move it above 行前建議/日出日落 so selecting a day and reading its advice happens in one viewport; horizontal scroll on narrow screens; interaction mechanics unchanged.
next_task_hint: This should be the final P1 frontend card. Remaining: Gemini activation decision, MOENV AQI (deferred), actual cloud deploy (waiting on deploy auth).
